vocabulary.example_sentence: I want to join the music club at school.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我想加入学校的音乐俱乐部。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Which club would you like to join?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 你想加入哪个俱乐部？

vocabulary.example_sentence: Choose a club that matches your ability.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 选一个符合你能力的俱乐部。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Alice acts in the school drama club.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 爱丽丝在学校戏剧社表演。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Bill plays Chinese chess after school.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 比尔放学后下中国象棋。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Music gives me a happy feeling.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 音乐给我带来快乐的感觉。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Good news! Our club show is soon.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 好消息！我们俱乐部的表演很快就要开始了。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Jenny is very musical and plays the drum.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 珍妮很有音乐天赋，会打鼓。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Choose a musical instrument you want to learn.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 选一种你想学的乐器。

vocabulary.example_sentence: That is exactly what Linda said in drama class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这正是琳达在戏剧课上说的。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He plays the drum in the school band.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他在学校乐队里打鼓。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She has the ability to paint and climb well.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她有画画和攀爬的能力。

vocabulary.chinese: 用颜料画；在……上刷油漆；油漆；涂料
vocabulary.example_sentence: I paint pictures of nature at home.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我在家画大自然的图画。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We climb hills to discover more insects.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们爬山去发现更多昆虫。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I want to collect more photos of wildlife.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我想收集更多野生动物的照片。

vocabulary.example_sentence: They act out a short drama in class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他们在课上表演一段短剧。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The club will act out the news story.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 俱乐部将把这个新闻故事表演出来。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I practice the drum at home every day.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我每天在家练鼓。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Are you interested in nature clubs?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 你对自然类社团感兴趣吗？

vocabulary.example_sentence: Bill is interested in insects and wildlife.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 比尔对昆虫和野生动物感兴趣。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Our club helps students discover nature.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们的俱乐部帮助同学们探索大自然。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We eat beef at home more than before.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们在家吃牛肉比以前多了。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The club show will start soon.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 俱乐部表演很快就要开始。

vocabulary.chinese: （用以引出比较的第二部分）比
vocabulary.example_sentence: I like drama more than chess.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我比起国际象棋更喜欢戏剧。

vocabulary.example_sentence: More than ten students join the club.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 十多名学生加入了俱乐部。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Do you mind if I take photos here?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 你介意我在这里拍照吗？

vocabulary.example_sentence: Many students fall in love with painting.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 许多学生爱上了绘画。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Alice fell in love with musical drama.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 爱丽丝爱上了音乐戏剧。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We take photos of insects in the park.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们在公园里给昆虫拍照。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Jenny collects news about wildlife.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 珍妮收集关于野生动物的新闻。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We discover new insects on every climb.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们每次爬山都会发现新昆虫。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Linda loves to discover wildlife with friends.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 琳达喜欢和朋友一起发现野生生物。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Protect wildlife when you explore nature.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 探索大自然时要保护野生动物。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Linda chooses the nature club.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 琳达选择了自然俱乐部。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Alice acts in the school drama club.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 爱丽丝在学校戏剧社表演。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Bill is interested in Chinese chess.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 比尔对中国象棋感兴趣。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Jenny plays the drum in the music club.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 珍妮在音乐俱乐部里打鼓。
